merchant_instruction: Ask timber merchant for 8 dry hardwood blocks.
do_not_accept: Wet/soft wood, plywood/MDF/chipboard, cracks, oil, paint, rocking faces, bad knots
notes: For suspension/brake setup cribbing with rated jack stands; not a stand substitute.

dimension_spec: 200 x 100 mm base; 75 mm rear; 25 mm nose
merchant_instruction: Ask for 4 dry hardwood wedge chocks; if not possible, buy 4 blanks at 200 x 100 x 75 mm.
acceptance_check: Flat base; blunt 25 mm nose; does not rock.
do_not_accept: Same rejects as blocks; also reject feather-edge or split wedges
notes: For chocking/stabilising during suspension work; not primary support.
